description_long: This is a large, freestanding awning structure with a rectangular, gently sloped metal roof supported by a robust black metal frame. The roof is anchored at both ends by substantial stone-clad columns, one of which features a prominent chimney extending above the roofline. The open sides and front provide ample sheltered space beneath, making it suitable for outdoor gatherings or vehicle protection. The underside of the roof reveals exposed trusses, adding to the structural integrity and visual interest. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on durability and weather resistance.
description: A modern, freestanding awning with a sloped metal roof, stone columns, and open sides, supported by a black metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the awning, the stone column with chimney on the left, and the open sheltered area beneath the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, the central chimney, and the depth of the sheltered space.
description_view_2: Rear view with the stone column and chimney on the right, and the open structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stone chimney, the exposed trusses, and the open entry beneath the awning.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding on a concrete slab, supported by stone columns and metal posts
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
